name: Valley Gold & Silver Exchange
description_short: Family-owned precious metals and jewelry buyer in San Jose offering collateral-based loans, estate liquidations, and numismatic sales since 1981.
description_long:
Valley Gold & Silver Exchange is a family-owned and operated business located in San Jose, California, that has been serving the Bay Area for over 40 years since 1981. The company operates as a local precious metals dealer and pawn shop positioned in the heart of Silicon Valley, providing convenient access for customers seeking to buy, sell, or loan against valuable items.

The company offers a range of services centered on precious metals and collectibles. Customers can liquidate outdated jewelry and hard assets, purchase rare coins and bullion investments, and obtain collateral-based loans against jewelry and precious metals (described as "Ask about our loans!" on their website). They also handle estate liquidations and work with numismatic collections and gemological items. The business emphasizes seamless transactions for both small and large deals.

What distinguishes Valley Gold & Silver Exchange is their 40 years of established professional experience working with all forms of jewelry and their stated extensive knowledge of current market trends in precious metals, jewelry, and numismatics. They highlight their development of a network of additional professional buyers and their reputation for family ownership with strong customer service. Their location provides easy access in Silicon Valley, and they note having served thousands of clients over their operational history.

The primary limitation of this business is its restricted operating hours (Tuesday to Friday, 10:30 AM to 5 PM only), which may not accommodate all customer schedules. While they offer appointments, the limited weekly availability could be inconvenient for working professionals. Additionally, as a pawn and precious metals dealer rather than a traditional lender, their loan offerings are collateral-dependent and subject to item valuation rather than credit-based lending.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 40 years of operational history and local reputation in the Bay Area since 1981
Family-owned and operated business emphasizing professional customer service
Handles multiple transaction types: buying, selling, loans, and estate liquidations
Extensive knowledge of precious metals market trends, jewelry, and numismatic valuations
Developed network of additional professional buyers for broader market access
Located in Silicon Valley with convenient San Jose location on South Bascom Avenue
Experience with both small and large transactions for diverse customer needs
cons: Very limited operating hours (Tuesday-Friday, 10:30 AM-5 PM only) restricts accessibility
No online valuation or instant quote system mentioned; requires in-person visits
Loan offerings are collateral-based only, not suitable for unsecured personal borrowing needs
No information provided about loan terms, APR, fees, or repayment structures
best_for: People looking to liquidate jewelry, gold, or collectible coins for cash
Collectors and investors seeking to buy rare coins or bullion in person
Estate executors and individuals managing liquidation of precious metal assets
diagnosis: Valley Gold & Silver Exchange is best for Bay Area residents and collectors who own precious metals, jewelry, or coins and need to liquidate or obtain quick cash via collateral-based loans. The primary caveat is their extremely limited operating hours (Tuesday-Friday, 10:30 AM-5 PM), which requires customers to plan visits during business hours, and the fact that they are a collateral lender rather than a personal loan provider—loans are secured by item value, not creditworthiness.
services: Collateral-based loans against jewelry and precious metals
Gold and silver buying and selling
Cash transactions for precious metal sales
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 368 S Bascom Ave, San Jose, CA 95128
